questions.question: How long do the results last?
questions.answer: Results typically last 12-24 months, depending on your lifestyle habits. Touch-ups may be needed to maintain desired results.

questions.question: Is teeth whitening safe?
questions.answer: Yes, professional teeth whitening is safe when performed under dental supervision. We use proven products and techniques to minimize sensitivity.

questions.question: Will I experience sensitivity?
questions.answer: Some patients may experience temporary sensitivity during or after treatment. We take precautions to minimize this and provide aftercare instructions.

questions.question: How white will my teeth get?
questions.answer: Most patients see an improvement of 5-8 shades in one treatment. Results vary based on initial tooth color and condition.

aftercare.title: Post-Treatment Care
aftercare.description: Maintain your bright smile with these care instructions
instructions: Avoid staining foods and drinks for 48 hours
